external_services.service_name: Enrollment Procedure for New Students at the Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Enrollment Procedure for New Students at the Kolehiyo ng Lungsod
who_may_avail: Senior high school completers from any public or private schools who qualified in the admission requirements of KLL

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Transcript of Records (for transferees) – 1 original copy
Certification of Good Moral Character – 1 original copy

steps.agency_action: 1.1. Check the original credentials and admission slip
steps.person_responsible: OIC-Registrar / Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.agency_action: 1.2. Give registration form with list of subjects
steps.person_responsible: OIC-Registrar / Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.agency_action: 1.3. Approve and sign filled-up registration form
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.client_step: 2. Claim class cards and registration form
steps.agency_action: 2. Stamp ENROLLED and give class cards to newly enrolled students
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

external_services.service_name: Enrolment Procedure for Old Students at Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Enrolment Procedure for Old Students at Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa
who_may_avail: Students who were able to pass the preceding semester

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Registration Form from the previous semester
checklist_of_requirements.source: Student applicant or Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.client_step: 1. Present class cards and clearance for evaluation
steps.agency_action: 1. Evaluate the presented documents, issue list of subjects to be enrolled and official registration form
steps.person_responsible: OIC-Registrar / Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.agency_action: 2. Approve and sign the duly accomplished registration form
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.client_step: 3. Claim class cards and registration form
steps.agency_action: 3. Stamp ENROLLED and issue class cards based on the number of subjects enrolled
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

external_services.service_name: Application for Admission and Entrance Examination
who_may_avail: Applicants currently enrolled in Grade 12 for the Second Semester
High School Graduates on or before March 2015

steps.client_step: 1. Accomplish the Online Application Form for Admission
steps.agency_action: 1. Check the submitted application form of the applicant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide V / II - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.client_step: 2. Submit the accomplished scanned copy/ies of Application Form
steps.agency_action: 2. Check the submitted form/s of the applicant
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide V - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa

steps.client_step: 3. Visit the KLL official Facebook page for schedule
steps.agency_action: 3. Schedule the date and time of the entrance examination
steps.person_responsible: Admission Officer - Kolehiyo ng Lungsod ng Lipa
Testing and Admission Officer of the Day
Testing and Admission Officer of the Day

steps.client_step: 5. Qualified applicants proceed to Registrar for enrollment
steps.agency_action: 5.1. Release/ post the results via KLL Facebook page
steps.person_responsible: Admission Officer / Director, Student Programs

steps.client_step: 5. Qualified applicants proceed to Registrar for enrollment
steps.agency_action: 5.2. Visit Office of the Student Affairs for queries
steps.person_responsible: Admission Officer / Director, Student Programs
